title: Initio Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults, 5 Modes with Smart Timer, 8 Brush Heads & Travel Case Included, Rechargeable Toothbrush, Oral Care Whitening Toothbrush, IT959
description: Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults adopts advanced technology by providing 40,000 high-speed vibrations per minute and effectively removing all teeth stains! The rechargeable electric toothbrush's built-in timer automatically shuts off in 2 minutes and pauses every 30 seconds to allow for ample brushing time and habits. 5 High-Performance-Brushing modes are available to meet different oral needs. Brush in the shower as this unit is waterproof up to IPX7 standard. Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults provides 8 famous DuPont brush heads for over 2 years of using. Each brush head comes with a protective cover to keep it clean and hygienic! Lastly, we provide you with a one-year warranty against any defects or issues you may have with the electric toothbrush. It can be your choice for Christmas, New Year Mother's Day and Valentine's Day gifts.
features: 40,000 STROKES PER MINUTE & 5 BRUSHING MODES - Initio rechargeable electric toothbrush for adults with advanced technology provides 40,000 high-speed vibrations per minute to effectively remove stains! 5 High-Performance electric toothbrush modes (whitening, cleaning, polishing, massaging, sensitivity) to meet your varied oral needs and are suitable for any brushing purpose. Recommend sensitivity mode for kids.

2 MINUTES SMART TIMER & LONG LASTING BATTERY LIFE - This electric toothbrush built-in Timer with 2 minutes- auto shut-off and interval pausing every 30 seconds encourages a proper brushing habit. The rechargeable electric toothbrush for adults is powered by a safe and durable lithium battery that can last up to 45 days of brushing on a single full charge. With Initio electric toothbrush never worry about bringing your charger when you travel!

8 DUPONT BRUSH HEADS & TRAVEL CASE INCLUDE- Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults provides 8 DuPont brush heads for over 2 years of using. Each electric toothbrush head comes with a protective cover to keep it clean and hygienic! And the quality-made travel case is ideal for any trip and enable you to easily transport your electric toothbrush and brush heads wherever you go. A best choice for your home and travel!

LIGHTWEIGHT HANDLE DESIGN AND CONVENIENT CHARGING -The electric toothbrush is easy to hold and made with anti-slip material. The electric toothbrush can be charged anytime and anywhere with a USB cable. Plus, this electric toothbrush has a low battery indicator and auto shut off when the unit is fully charged to prevent battery from being overcharged and damaged. Please kindly know that the package DO NOT include the AC Adaptor.

IPX7 WATERPROOF - This electric toothbrush is a water-resistant unit up to IPX7 standard. The entire toothbrush can be safely rinsed with water. You may also safely brush with it in the bath or shower. Initio sonic electric toothbrush is also a perfect Valentine's Day gift.

title: Philips Sonicare 4100 Electric Rechargeable Power Toothbrush, Black, with Genuine Optimal Plaque Control Replacement Toothbrush Heads, White, 3 Pack
description: Remove plaque and experience a deep, effective clean with Sonicare technology, removing up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Sonicare technology gently pulses water between your teeth, for a month's worth of manual brushing in just 2 minutes. The QuadPacer lets you know when you've spent the optimal amount of time on each section of your mouth while the SmarTimer signals when your 2 minutes is up. The pressure sensor flashes red to remind you to ease off, helping to prevent gum recession, while the 2 intensity settings ensure a comfortable clean that’s right for you. Going electric might feel like a big step, but with this brush you’re in safe hands. Its slim ergonomic design and familiar-shaped head gives you everything you need for an effective clean. The kit includes 1 Philips Sonicare 4100 electric toothbrush, 1 Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush head and 1 USB charger (wall adaptor not included). An additional 3 pack of Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush heads included.

Pressure sensor and two intensity settings protect sensitive gums from overbrushing

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

title: Oral-B Pulsar Battery Toothbrush With Charcoal Infused Bristles, Soft
description: Oral B Pulsar charcoal infused toothbrush is battery operated to gently vibrate and polish away stains for a whiter, cleaner smile. Using the same technique to brush as a manual toothbrush, The bristles vibrate providing a gentle massaging and polishing action while brushing. The bristles penetrate between teeth where stain build-up often begins. Pulsar has soft vibrating bristles that help break up plaque between teeth. Plus, the split head design moderates the amount of pressure applied to your teeth and gums. Contouring to your unique smile, The Pulsar toothbrush will leave your smile bright and clean with every use.
features: You will receive 1 Oral-B Pulsar battery toothbrush with charcoal infused bristles, battery included
The Charcoal infused bristles gently vibrate to effectively clean plaque and remove surface stains for whiter teeth
Penetrates deep between teeth and hard-to-reach areas of the mouth to sweep away plaque and stains caused by Food
Adjusts to the contours of your teeth and moderates the pressure applied to your teeth and gums
Oral-B is the #1 dentist-recommended toothbrush brand worldwide

reviews.text: It’s an Oral-B.  I prefer this brand and hopped on the charcoal type at the advice of my former dentist.  She recommended.

reviews.title: Weak vibration
reviews.text: Not the best

reviews.title: Great Product!
reviews.text: Great Product!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I always use the Oral B battery toothbrushes - I’m over 80, with my original teeth, and this toothbrush has kept me in good shape for years.  I like that they remind me to get a new about every three months.  The charcoal one helps to keep my teeth as white as they can be at this age - no taste involved - just mixes with your toothpaste and it does a great job.  I also find that this toothbrush brushes my gums, too, and I have not had any bleeding gums in years.  This is the only toothbrush I will buy.

reviews.title: Clean Those Teeth
reviews.text:
I love this electric tooth brush, by Oral-B as it is so different from ones I have tried before. I thought I would have to insert the battery but to my surprise it was already inserted and ready to be used. It was so easy and the button you need to push is clearly marked with a + so you push that and you are ready to add toothpaste and brush away. Just push the – sign and it stops. That was so easy and fast and you got a good brushing of your teeth. The bristles are charcoal infused bristle and this adds to completely clean your teeth and makes them feel clean.

I am wondering what one has to do if battery is used up as could not figure out where to change a battery. There was not that much explanations but I am enjoying the use of this great Oral-B for a great battery tooth brush. Great way to start the day with an Oral-B electric tooth cleaning.

title: Curaprox Soft Toothbrush CS 1560, 6 Pack, Colors May Vary
description: The CS 1560 Soft Toothbrush gently fights plaque and stains with the power of CUREN filaments. With densely packed and incredibly gentle bristles, the CS 1560 provides a deeper clean without damaging your gums. Tough on plaque and delicate on gums, the CS 1560 is designed for optimum oral health. The octagonal handle of the CS 1560 delivers precise manipulation to brush at every angle, with an angled brush head removes stubborn plaque and stains in hard-to-reach places. Enamel erosion and receding gum lines can be caused by vigorous scrubbing and hard brushes. To prevent this kind of damage, switch to a softer bristle like the CS 1560. CUREN bristles are gentler than typical nylon brushes for a healthier smile.
features: BRIGHTER SMILE: Transition to a softer brush and deeper clean with the CS 1560, equipped with 1,560 tightly packed 0.15 mm bristles to fight plaque and stay gentle on enamel and gums.
SOFT BRISTLES: By using CUREN filaments instead of nylon, Curaprox toothbrush bristles are incredibly fine and gentle to prevent enamel erosion.
GENTLE ON GUMS: Harsh brushing and stiff bristles can irritate your gum line. The CS 1560 cleans gently to promote gum and oral health.
ANGLED BRUSH: The angled head allows you to remove stubborn plaque and stains in hard to reach places.
STOCK UP: Available in a pack of 6 to stay stocked up year round for a healthier smile.

reviews.title: Order if you know the product!
reviews.text:
This is the best toothbrush in the market so far. I bought per as the advise of my dentist. She recommended it as it will produce better cleaning results due the high amount of brushes. She suggested Soft per as my specific conditions.
I would recommend to anyone buying this per as the advise of a dentist and also be aware that the touch and feeling is not similar to regular ones and may take a while to get used.
So far I love this toothbrush and will keep using it forever.

title: GUM Crayola Twistables Kids Toothbrush with Fun Twisting Head, Soft Bristles, Ages 3+ (Pack of 4) -230TT
description:
Product Description
Getting your kids excited about their daily tooth brushing routine requires more than just an ordinary kids toothbrush. Give them the fun and functional GUM Crayola Twistables Toothbrush for kids. It’s one of the best toothbrushes to keep kids engaged with bright and colorful handles, as well as a twistable head that can be extended from the toothbrush handle with a twist of the bottom green knob. When not in use, kids can twist the toothbrush back and store upside down in the included toothbrush cap. The cap doubles as a stand to keep the brush from rolling off the bathroom sink. This toothbrush also comes with soft, antibacterial bristles to further inhibit germ growth. The toothpaste sweet spot is highlighted by the colored bristles in the center of the compact head to teach children how much toothpaste they should be using. If you want to equip your little ones with a kids' toothbrush that will get them enthusiastic about their twice-daily tooth brushing routine, the GUM Crayola Twistable Toothbrush is what you need.
Manufacturer Contact Information
1-888-777-3116
features: EXTENDABLE TOOTHBRUSH HEAD: Twist the green knob on the handle to extend the compact toothbrush head for a fun and functional cleaning experience

KIDS TOOTHBRUSH CAP & STAND: Convenient antibacterial cap and stand to keep the brush from rolling off the sink. When it’s time to travel, pop the cap on top to cover the brush – perfect for road trips, camping, and sleepovers
CLINICALLY PROVEN BRISTLES: GUM Dome Trim brushes feature a raised center bristle design that provides greater contact with the tooth surface, while also reaching under the gum line
TOOTHPASTE SWEET SPOT: The compact head features colored centered soft bristles that teach children where to place their toothpaste and how much paste is needed
THE GUM MISSION: We are committed to helping people of all ages have stronger, healthier teeth, and gums by providing high quality, innovative oral care products that promote optimal dental health

reviews.title: Meh its ok
reviews.text: Its just a cheap what you would get for free at the kids dentist office kind of brush. Its totally flat but thats not a huge deal for me. The brush twisting gets my kids more into brushing their teeth but when I am brushing, the brush itself doesn't lock into place as as you are going around in their mouth and moving your hand it twists and doesn't stay in place. So I am typically adjusting at least once mid brush. Usually my kiddos are good about brushing but they have their days so its those days its really an issue for me. For the price it isn't worth it for me.

reviews.title: Great product! Decent price!
reviews.text: (Picture only shows three but there were four) adorable colors and tons of fun for my four year old. I thought they twisted all the way down but actually the head stays out then u use the stand as a cover which is what I needed since hes always knocking stuff off the bathroom sink. Will recommend to friends and family, and buy again in the future, really great product!

reviews.title: Fake 5 star reviews on here!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:5dfb9184c45053dabbd9b211960ab648]] First of all, there is some fake sketchy reviews on here… there is no way that these crappie silicone toothbrushes will actually brush your teeth and get all your nasty plaque of your teeth.

Second, these aren’t put sealed packaging, there are just shoved in a box and who knows what material they’re made out of? Made in fancy China… no offense to China, I really like them, they just have a bad reputation for cheaply made products that have harmful chemicals in them.

Sorry but this is a hard NO for me and a return.

reviews.title: Nice mouth feel too
reviews.text: These are sturdy enough to get debris out and still just long enough to work around appliances.  Doesn't hurt my gums, actually, feels good to brush

reviews.title: Works Great On Braces, My Kids Like Them, Brush Cover
reviews.text:
I got this Ortho Standard 33 orthodontic toothbrush almost two months ago and decided to get this value pack. My kids have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, and since using these it’s been better. I don’t notice food stuck or buildup on their brackets.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles or handles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help brush teeth better while having braces.

reviews.title: My Kids Like It, The Brush Head Cover is A Bonus
reviews.text:
I got the Ortho Standard 33 for my kids because they have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, I was hoping these would help due to the design of them.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help better brush teeth while having braces.

reviews.title: It works great
reviews.text: This toothbrush works great to clean around those brackets!

reviews.title: Good design for brushing with braces
reviews.text: I got these for my young adult son who wears braces, and he is very pleased with them. The size of the brush is just right for maneuvering around teeth and braces. The bristles are angled which makes it helpful to thoroughly remove food and tartar for someone with braces. I like that there is a pack of 6, so that there is always a new toothbrush available when the current one needs to be replaced.

reviews.title: If you have sensitive gums, buy this OEM Oral-B Toothbrush Head vs Chinese After-Market
reviews.text: My wife has sensitive gums.  These OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads are much softer but still do the job vs supposedly equivalent "sensitive" Chinese After-Market heads.  While the Chinese after-market toothbrush heads are much cheaper, they contributed to my wife's $2,000. gum surgery.  I swapped back to OEM Oral-B brush heads and all is now good for her.  Live and learn I guess or, better yet, you get what you pay for.  Buy these OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads with confidence.

reviews.title: My grandson actually wants to brush now.

This brush is fun, and my grandson actually wants to brush since we picked it up.

Brush vibrates quietly, bristles are stationary. As you brush the stars light up.
The goal is to brush long enough to get all the stars lit up.
When you change something into a game, it motivates kids to try to "win".

I like the concept. Charger and extra brush head included.

They came packaged just fine and we got all three in perfect shape.  They are like her old heads for the toothbrush, not too hard and not too soft and they fit perfectly.  As long as my daughter still enjoys her specific tooth brush I will keep getting these for her.

reviews.title: Nifty toothbrush, brush all the teeth at once
reviews.text:
Just add toothpaste, stick in mouth and brush side to side. Gets all the teeth clean at the same time. Very nifty. The brush head is a little flexible, so it can adjust to her jaw shape. I think the only thing that concerns me is that this is not really teaching the kid how to brush with a regular toothbrush. For now, it's really useful since she gets impatient with brushing teeth.
It came with a spare brush head which just pops on to the small metal rod. It's also very cute.

reviews.title: Simple and easy to use
reviews.text: This little toothbrush is pretty cheap in comparison to others similar to it, but it also doesn’t have any special functions. It just works as is, you put tooth paste between the bristles and then it’s used manually. No vibrations or flashing colors, but it does have a super cute design and hey at least it doesn’t need to be charged because those cords always seem to get lost too lol. Great price point for a bit more of a detailed, deep clean for kiddos’ teeth. Recommend!

reviews.title: The more data the better!
reviews.text: A smart toothbrush is an excellent idea! It works and there isn’t enough data when it comes to tooth brushing. It’s helpful to know exactly where to focus, excellent idea for kids. The app works and is easy to find.

reviews.title: Great child toothbrush
reviews.text: Love this idea but hate having my phone or childs phone near the sink or water. love the encouraging messages and timers to ensure its the best!

reviews.title: Useless don’t buy
reviews.text: This thing is useless.

reviews.title: Pretty cool motivator for kids
reviews.text:
As the product is named, it's a manual toothbrush, so just be sure you're not expecting anything electric here. It still does involve technology as the toothbrush has a display that yields information, such as how long you've been brushing and other messages on your performance. The real feature though is that the toothbrush has a blue sensor in it which you use to connect to an app which gets information on how long you brushed, which areas, if you pressed the brush too hard on your teeth or gums, etc., and spits out a brushing report.

We thought moving to an electric toothbrush would motivate our daughter to brush more a few years ago, and it did, but the results were limited. As she's 8, and at an age where she's really becoming a bookworm, she likes reading the brushing reports and it motivates her to brush herself.

As I said the brush is manual, and obviously the bristles will wear down with time, so the head of the brush is detachable and can be replaced for $3.50 for a set of 2 (price as of January 9, 2023). Obviously, you don't want to buy a whole new brush with technology in it every time the bristles get weaker.

I'm glad this one is getting my daughter to understand to brush correctly and she wants to do it regularly to see how she's doing.

reviews.title: Cool concept to make brushing fine, interactive, and technologically appealing!
reviews.text: This seems like a really neat way to keep track of and encourage brushing teeth. Bluetooth connects to phone and functions via the app you have to download, so in order to use and track, you need to be near the connected phone or tablet. Looking forward to setting it up for my niece to use when she visits.

title: Better & Better Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for Adults | Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush | Replaceable Bamboo Brush Heads w/Soft, Plant-Based Bristles | 5 Cleaning Modes & Long-Lasting Battery
features: A Cleaner Clean and Brighter, Whiter Smile - Improve your brushing routine with Better & Better’s Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for adults equipped with soft, natural, plant-based bristles made from castor bean oil. Our sonic toothbrush produces up to 38,000 microvibrations per minute for high polish and gentle clean. Choose from its 5 cleaning modes depending on your brushing needs.

Smart, Seamless & More Powerful Cleaning - Our bamboo electric toothbrush for adults features a 2-minute dentist-recommended timer with 30-second interval pulses. Flaunt your unique smile with the help of the sonic toothbrush's 5 cleaning modes: cleaning (default) for removing plaque, whitening for improving surface color, polishing mode for brightening your front teeth, milder for gentle gum massage, and sensitive for a super gentle mode for sensitive teeth and gums.

A Better Brushing Routine - The bamboo sonic toothbrush’s cleaning modes and plant-based bristles are safe to use on braces and dental restorations (fillings, crowns, veneers, or implants). Our electric toothbrush for adults is certified cruelty-free and comes in recyclable packaging.

Designed for Optimal Brushing Experience - Our bamboo electric sonic brush comes with replaceable bamboo heads. The entire brush is waterproof, so you can use it in the shower. The long-lasting and rechargeable battery also makes this the perfect travel toothbrush to keep your routine tip top on the go. You only need to charge it every 30-40 days when your routine consists of brushing twice, morning and night.

Better for You. Better for the Planet - We set out to make toothbrushes that are good in every way. Our unique natural bamboo brush heads create less waste when replaced. We prioritize the health of our bodies and our planet, which leads us to imagine entirely new ways of doing things. And as we minimize the ecological effects of our products and packaging, we create a better world.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush ever.
reviews.text:
I’ve used Sonicare Diamondclean for years - but after trying this one, I’ll never go back. It’s gentler, cleans better, and less than half the price of Diamondclean. I love the bamboo, the soft bristles. The only thing I wish it had two buttons (one for on/off, one for the settings), and a wireless induction charging base.
But as is I still love it.

reviews.title: Bamboo sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Good, sonic (vibrations rather than spinning) toothbrush. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. It comes with only 2 replacement heads which deducts a star as I expect at least 4. It does comes with a toothbrush holder stand to recharge with a 30-40 day battery life. Many of these brushes only come with a ubs cable, so the included toothbrush holder is a great addition. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. This toothbrush is unique as it is made with bamboo making it a more natural product!

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

Tongue cleaning should be done with another device.
